# Supreme Nomads Detailing

> Supreme Nomads Detailing is a mobile auto detailing company based in Charlotte, NC. We come to you — no drop-off required. Founded in 2022, we specialize in premium detailing, ceramic coatings, and paint protection film across the Charlotte metro area and surrounding cities in NC and SC.

Supreme Nomads Detailing LLC is co-owned by Akash and Tenzin, both Charlotte residents with backgrounds in technology and a passion for cars. The company's mission is to provide personalized, high-quality detailing with a focus on quality service, punctuality, and clear communication on every job.

Contact: info@supremenomads.com | (704) 561-1927 | (704) 312-2725

## Services

- [Detailing Packages](/services): Four tiers — Premium ($300–$400), Exterior Only ($160–$200), Interior Only ($160–$180), and Express ($125–$175). Prices vary by vehicle size: Sedan/Coupé, 2-Row SUV/Small Truck, and 3-Row SUV/Large Truck.
- [Paint Protection Packages](/services): Supreme Nomads Special ($475–$625), Ceramic Coating ($950–$1,300+), and Paint Protection Film/PPF ($1,000–$1,200+). Ceramic Coating includes 2-stage hand-applied ceramic and 2-step paint correction for 5–7 year longevity.
- [Maintenance Plans](/services): Available to paint protection customers. 6-wash ($500–$700) and 12-wash ($800–$1,200) plans by vehicle size. Each wash must be scheduled within 40 days.
- [Add-On Services](/services): Cabin Air Filter Replacement, Ozone Odor Removal, Pet Hair Removal, Stain Removal (extractor vacuum), Engine Bay Detail, Headlight Restoration, Paint Touch Up, Trim Restoration, Undercarriage Cleaning.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of services, gallery of past work, pricing overview, and quick booking link.
- [Book Now](/booking): Online booking page to schedule a detailing appointment.
- [Our Services](/services): Full breakdown of all detailing packages, paint protection options, maintenance plans, and add-on services with pricing.
- [Gallery](/gallery): Photo gallery of completed detailing jobs including ceramic coatings, PPF, and interior work.
- [About Us](/about): Background on founders Akash and Tenzin, company mission, and operating philosophy.
- [Academy](/academy): The SND Academy — educational articles, tips, and detailing insights from the Supreme Nomads team. Posts are published via Sanity CMS.

## Service Area

**North Carolina:** Charlotte, Concord, Cornelius, Harrisburg, Huntersville, Indian Trail, Matthews, Mooresville, Waxhaw, Lake Norman, Pineville

**South Carolina:** Fort Mill, Indian Land, Lake Wylie, Rock Hill
